dhp116:1: Be quick in doing what’s admirable.
dhp116:2: Restrain your mind from what’s evil.
dhp116:3: When you’re slow in making merit,
dhp117:2: he shouldn’t do it again & again,
dhp117:3: shouldn’t develop a penchant for it.
dhp118:2: he should do it again & again,
dhp118:3: should develop a penchant for it.
dhp119:1: Even the evil meet with good fortune
dhp119:2: as long as their evil has yet to mature.
dhp119:4: that’s when they meet with evil.
dhp120:1: Even the good meet with bad fortune
dhp120:2: as long as their good has yet to mature.
dhp120:4: that’s when they meet with good fortune.
dhp121:3: A water jar fills, even with water falling in drops.
dhp121:5: With evil–even if bit by bit, habitually– the fool fills himself full.
dhp122:4: A water jar fills, even with water falling in drops.
dhp122:5: With merit–even if bit by bit, habitually– the enlightened one fills himself full.
dhp123:1: Like a merchant with a small but well-laden caravan –a dangerous road,
dhp123:3: like a person who loves life –a poison,
dhp124:1: If there’s no wound on the hand,
dhp124:3: Poison won’t penetrate where there’s no wound.
dhp124:4: There’s no evil for those who don’t do it.
dhp125:3: the evil comes right back to the fool
dhp125:4: like fine dust thrown against the wind.
dhp126:1: Some are born in the human womb,
dhp126:3: those on the good course go to heaven,
dhp126:4:
while those without effluent:
totally unbound.
dhp127:1: Not up in the air, nor in the middle of the sea,
dhp127:2: nor going into a cleft in the mountains
dhp127:3: –nowhere on earth– is a spot to be found
dhp127:4: where you could stay & escape your evil deed.
dhp128:1: Not up in the air, nor in the middle of the sea,
dhp128:2: nor going into a cleft in the mountains
dhp128:3: –nowhere on earth– is a spot to be found
dhp128:4: where you could stay & not succumb to death.
